hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); c=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command','') or ''; reasons=[]; (reasons.append('Blocked: --no-verify bypasses pre-commit hooks. Fix the underlying issue instead.') if '--no-verify' in c else None); (reasons.append('Blocked: force-push to protected branch. Use a PR workflow instead.') if ('push' in c and '--force' in c and any(b in c for b in ['main','dev'])) else None); (reasons.append('Warning: destructive operation on data/ directory. Verify you have backups.') if ('rm' in c and 'data/' in c) else None); (print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PreToolUse','permissionDecision':'deny','permissionDecisionReason':reasons[0]}})) if reasons else None)"
